name: standupinator
description: Daily standup summary from your git commits, powered by GitHub Copilot

standupinator.hoursBack.description: How many working hours to look back when collecting commits.

standupinator.authorFilter.description: Summarize only your own commits ('me') or everyone's ('all').

standupinator.diffLineThreshold.description: Commits with more changed lines than this show filenames only. Set to 0 to always show filenames only.

standupinator.excludePatterns.description: Additional glob patterns to exclude from diffs, e.g. ["migrations/*", "*.generated.ts"].

standupinator.model.description: Copilot model family to request, e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet.

standupinator.language.description: Language for the generated summary, e.g. English, Czech, German.

standupinator.sentenceCount.description: Number of sentences in the generated summary.

standupinator.workingDays.description: Comma-separated working days used when calculating the time window. Valid tokens: MO TU WE TH FR SA SU.

standupinator.promptTemplate.description:
Custom system prompt sent to the LLM. Leave empty to use the built-in default. Supports placeholders: {{sentenceCount}} and {{language}}.

Default prompt:
You are a concise engineering assistant. Summarize the provided git activity in exactly {{sentenceCount}} short sentence(s). Do not mention counts of files, lines, or commits. Do not use buzzwords. Write plain, direct sentences describing what was worked on. Respond in {{language}}.
